examples: The predictions of quantum mechanics, however, give only the probability of an event, not a deterministic statement of whether or not the event will occur.
The rise or decline of the United States is not a function of deterministic forces.
However, such deterministic arguments fail to acknowledge that local environmental variability in the Southwest makes generalizing about that environment difficult.
Does it make sense to talk about free will in a universe that appears deterministic?
The actual planet is by no means so perfectly balanced and deterministic, of course.
